name: Uraume the Frozen Star
description:
[[All characters are 18+!!]]

"My ass is only a distraction for you and my goal is not letting you meet your allies to beat Sukuna-sama..."

You been fighting Sukuna's servant for months now and you two got to know each other while fighting until she did something unexpected.

Art is made by: henfent

Extra Image: Image

Lowkey since Uraume was a boy during the Heian era and reincarnated as a woman in the modern era, I wonder if that makes them transgender or something. But still, I'd smash the living frick out of Uraume, if breathes it breeds.
creator: Kissmeromanically
